evaluations.query: Create a NotebookLM notebook for my auth refactor project, add the OAuth 2.1 spec as a source, and query it for key differences from OAuth 2.0
expected_behavior: Claude calls notebook_create with a descriptive title
Calls source_add with source_type=url for the OAuth spec URL
Calls notebook_query with the comparison question
Follows the correct order: create -> add source -> query

evaluations.query: Generate an audio overview podcast from my notebook but the session expired
expected_behavior: Claude detects auth expiry concern and suggests running nlm login --check
Advises re-authenticating with nlm login before proceeding
Explains that sessions last approximately 20 minutes
After re-auth, calls studio_create with artifact_type=audio and polls studio_status

evaluations.query: Write a Python script that reads a CSV file and generates a bar chart with matplotlib
expected_behavior: Claude does NOT invoke any NotebookLM MCP tools
Uses standard Python/matplotlib knowledge instead of NotebookLM tools
No references to notebooks, sources, or studio content generation

evaluations.query: We keep re-investigating the same OOM errors in production. How can I build a debugging knowledge base with NotebookLM so the team can query past incident resolutions?
expected_behavior: Claude creates a dedicated debugging KB notebook separate from other domains
Claude adds incident reports and post-mortems as sources to the notebook
Claude queries the KB notebook before re-investigating known issues from scratch
Claude recommends keeping sources current by adding new incidents as they are resolved

evaluations.query: I need to research the latest developments in WebAssembly component model but manually finding and adding URLs is tedious. Can NotebookLM automate source discovery?
expected_behavior: Claude uses research_start with web and drive sources for automated topic discovery
Claude polls research_status for completion since research takes one to three minutes
Claude imports discovered results with research_import into the target notebook
Claude follows up with notebook_query to synthesize the newly imported sources

evaluations.query: I have a 100K character codebase I need to understand but pasting it into chat exceeds context limits. How do I offload large document analysis to NotebookLM?
expected_behavior: Claude adds the large codebase as a source using RepoMix instead of pasting into chat
Claude uses notebook_query for targeted synthesis without consuming the chat context window
Claude recommends multiple targeted queries over one massive context load for efficiency
Claude explains that NotebookLM reads the full source on each query without truncation

evaluations.query: I keep losing track of architecture decisions we made in previous Claude sessions. How can I create a persistent project knowledge base with NotebookLM?
expected_behavior: Claude creates one notebook per project to avoid mixing unrelated topic domains
Claude adds architecture decision records and design docs as notebook sources
Claude uses the note tool to capture in-session insights for future retrieval
Claude queries the notebook with notebook_query for grounded answers backed by actual sources

evaluations.query: I want to share my security handbook notebook with a colleague but I need to make sure no sensitive internal content is exposed publicly. How do I share safely?
expected_behavior: Claude checks current sharing status with notebook_share_status before modifying any settings
Claude reviews notebook content for sensitive material before enabling any sharing access
Claude prefers notebook_share_invite with specific collaborators over public link sharing
Claude uses role reader by default and only grants editor when collaboration is actively needed

evaluations.query: We just released OrchestKit v7.1 and I want to preserve the release context as a queryable knowledge base. How do I create a versioned notebook for this release?
expected_behavior: Claude creates one notebook per minor version with naming convention OrchestKit vX.Y Release Notes
Claude adds the CHANGELOG section as type text for better chunking rather than as a file
Claude includes key skill diffs only for skills with significant functional changes
Claude generates an audio overview via studio_create with deep_dive type for the release

evaluations.query: I just installed the NotebookLM CLI but all my MCP tool calls are failing silently. How do I set up authentication and register the MCP server with Claude Code?
expected_behavior: Claude runs nlm login first to authenticate via browser-based Google OAuth flow
Claude uses nlm setup add claude-code to register the MCP server with Claude Code
Claude verifies auth session status with nlm login --check before proceeding with tools
Claude warns that auth sessions expire after approximately 20 minutes of inactivity

evaluations.query: I want to generate a podcast overview and a slide deck from my notebook sources. How do I use NotebookLM Studio and what artifact types are available?
expected_behavior: Claude uses the async poll pattern: studio_create then studio_status then download_artifact
Claude informs the user that generation takes two to five minutes and polls periodically
Claude lists the nine available studio artifact types including audio, video, and slide deck
Claude checks studio_status before attempting download since downloading a pending artifact fails
